PRB_Recent.title: Interaction-induced moiré lattices: From mosaic mobility edges to localization
PRB_Recent.summary: Author(s): Yan-Hao Yang, Zhihao Xu, Lei Ying, and Qizhong Zhu We study localization driven solely by interparticle interactions in moiré lattice systems without intrinsic disorder or externally imposed quasiperiodic potentials. We consider a one-dimensional bilayer with incommensurate lattice constants, described by a spin-dependent Fermi-Hubbard-type model wi… [Phys. Rev. B 113, 174203] Published Thu May 14, 2026
